params.name: Gabija's Sacred Fire
params.description: Gabija's Sacred Fire is a legendary eternal flame lit by the earth goddess Gabija, symbolizing the abundance of the earth and the continuation of life. In Lithuanian mythology, the sun goddess Saulė drives a golden chariot across the sky, presenting the fire seed as a sacred covenant between the earth and the sky to the goddess Gabija. The fire seed contains Saulė's power, capable of dispelling darkness and protecting humanity from evil. Gabija uses the fire seed to ignite the sacred fire, grant …
